task_completion.description: Log into the NOSH ChartingSystem as the specified provider.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The NOSH ChartingSystem dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login (look for 'demo_provider' or provider dashboard elements).

task_completion.description: Open the chart for patient Robert Murphy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The active patient chart or demographic header displays 'Robert Murphy' and the DOB '08/15/1972' (or '1972-08-15').

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Imaging/Radiology orders section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An 'Orders' modal, tab, or section specifically for 'Imaging', 'Radiology', or 'Rad' is open on the screen.
The text 'MRI Lumbar Spine without Contrast' (or containing 'MRI', 'Lumbar', 'Spine') is entered into the study, test, or procedure input field.
The text 'Chronic lower back pain with left-sided radiculopathy' (or containing 'back pain' and 'radiculopathy') is entered into the indication, reason, or diagnosis input field.

task_completion.description: Save or submit the imaging order.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save', 'Submit', or 'Sign' button is clicked, a success notification is shown, or the newly created MRI order is visible in the patient's active orders list.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the NOSH web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the NOSH ChartingSystem UI, not terminal windows using curl or database commands.

integrity.description: The agent modified the actual patient record within the EHR.
integrity.visual_evidence: The order is being created within the context of the NOSH EHR system for Robert Murphy, not typed into a generic text editor or a disconnected form.

integrity.description: The agent did not use direct database queries to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL/MariaDB prompts, SQL INSERT statements, or backend scripts are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Robert Murphy. Patient DOB: 1972-08-15 (08/15/1972). Order Type: Radiology/Imaging ('rad'). Required Study Terms: 'MRI', 'Lumbar', 'Spine'. Required Indication Terms: 'back pain', 'radiculopathy'.
